title: Sour Gooey Chinese Apple Crumble
description: A kid-friendly and whole30-friendly sour gooey Chinese apple crumble featuring apple juice as the main sweetener.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons apple juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed is preferred for best flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon salt
ingredients.notes: To taste, use more if needed

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon whole wheat flour (or almond flour)
ingredients.notes: For a gluten-free option, replace with flax seeds mixed with water as binder

instructions: Combine apple slices and juice in a bowl. Season with salt.
In a separate bowl, mix flour with a bit of water until smooth and pour over the apples, making sure they are evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle 1/2 cup whole wheat granola (or coconut flakes for a dairy-free option) on top of the apple slices.
Bake for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Serve warm as a dessert.
